message.content:
Let me analyze the real estate website hero section based on your questions:

1) **Sera Property logo in the top-left navbar**: Yes, I can see a logo in the top-left corner of the navbar. It appears to be a simple, white/silver colored square logo with what looks like a stylized "S" or similar design. However, it doesn't appear to be blue-themed with a house icon based on what's visible in this image.

2) **'Simple' highlighted in blue**: I don't see a headline with the word "Simple" in this image. The visible text in the hero section is quite faint/transparent and difficult to read clearly, but I don't see any prominent blue highlighting on any specific word.

3) **Search button color**: I don't see a search button in this particular view of the hero section. The visible elements include the navigation menu items (Find Properties, Add a Property, etc.) and the Login button on the right, but no search button is clearly visible.

4) **Overall color scheme**: The website appears to have a blue/brand-consistent color scheme. The background shows a cityscape with buildings, and the overall tone has blue undertones. The navigation text appears to be white, which contrasts well with what seems to be a blue or dark background. The green chat button in the bottom right corner provides a contrasting accent color.

In summary, while the website does have a blue/brand-consistent color scheme, some of the specific elements you asked about (blue logo with house icon, highlighted "Simple" text, blue search button) aren't clearly visible or present in this particular view of the hero section.
